description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages test and package. Add a codequality job in the test stage using the alpine:latest image, with a before_script that runs wget -nv https://github.com/koalaman/shellcheck/releases/download/stable/shellcheck-stable.linux.x86_64.tar.xz, tar xvJf shellcheck-stable.linux.x86_64.tar.xz, cp shellcheck-stable/shellcheck /usr/local/bin, then runs shellcheck bacme and shellcheck test/test.sh. Add a tests job in the test stage using the opensuse/leap:latest image, with a before_script that runs zypper install -y bash openssl curl vim, then runs cd test && ./test.sh. Add a pack-release job in the package stage using the alpine:latest image, limited to tag pipelines, that runs tar cvf bacme-$CI_COMMIT_TAG.tar bacme openssl.conf README.md CHANGELOG.md EXAMPLES.md LICENSE.txt, then gzip bacme-$CI_COMMIT_TAG.tar, and publishes bacme-$CI_COMMIT_TAG.tar.gz as an artifact. Add a pack-snapshot job in the package stage using the alpine:latest image, excluded from tag pipelines, that runs tar cvf bacme-snapshot.tar bacme openssl.conf README.md CHANGELOG.md EXAMPLES.md LICENSE.txt, then gzip bacme-snapshot.tar, and publishes bacme-snapshot.tar.gz as an artifact that expires in 30 days.
